subject: Sports
title: PRP Therapy: Healing with Blood
description: A quick win: understand PRP Therapy: Healing with Blood.

hook.text: Doctors draw your blood, spin it, and inject the concentrated platelets back into your injury. It accelerates healing.

buildup.text: PRP—platelet-rich plasma—contains growth factors that promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation.

discovery.text: Athletes like Tiger Woods and Rafael Nadal have used PRP therapy to recover from chronic injuries.

twist.text: Scientific evidence is mixed. Some studies show clear benefits; others show no advantage over placebo.

climax.text: Despite the debate, PRP remains one of the most popular treatments in professional sports medicine.

punchline.text: Your own blood might be the best medicine. Science is still deciding.

quiz.question: What is PRP therapy?
options: Injecting concentrated platelets from the patient's own blood to promote healing
A type of surgery for torn ligaments
A protein supplement for muscle growth
